ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(Website)) && NOT(ISCHANGED(Stage__c)) && Website <> 'no_website' && (NOT(CONTAINS( Website , ".") ) || CONTAINS( Website , "www") || CONTAINS( Website , "https://") || CONTAINS( Website , "http://")) && $Profile.Name <> "BI Dev" && $Profile.Name <> "Infer API" && $Profile.Name <> "Integration User" && $Profile.Name <> "Integration User No DF" && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Account`s Website should match the format "google.com". Please remove any domain prefixes: "www", "https://", "http://".
